payload.claim_text: Funding for services associated with this contract will be provided by operating accounts from the Security Budget.
payload.subject: Homeless Outreach Staffing Services Contract
payload.description: Funding source for the contract

payload.claim_text: SCOUT has since expanded from the original two teams to the current ten teams, with a proposal in the 2026 State of the State to further expand to 15 teams.
payload.subject: SCOUT
payload.description: SCOUT expansion details

payload.claim_text: The Selection Committee consisted of the senior director of Homeless Security and Quality of Life Program, director of Data Information and Analysis from the Office of Security, and captain of the MTA Police Department.
payload.subject: Selection Committee
payload.description: Composition of the procurement selection committee

payload.claim_text: The SC unanimously determined that Essey's proposal provides the best value to the MTA, notwithstanding the difference in price.
payload.subject: Essey
payload.description: Selection Committee determination

payload.claim_text: This is the only effort to systematically assess these conditions across the subway system. All other data is reliant on inbound reports from customers and employees, which is useful but not comprehensive or systematic.
payload.subject: data collection contract
payload.description: Uniqueness of the contract's data collection
